- sugar

samples.title: Detailed Chocolate Cake
steps: Add to dry mixture,, one tablespoon at a mixture
Pour into into greased 9 x 9inch baking pan
samples.formatted:
Detailed Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- all-purpose flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- baking powder
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla extract
- boiling water
- chocolate frosting

Instructions:
1. Combine first 5 ingredients
2. Add eggs and milk
3. Stir well
4. Add oil and vanilla
5. Add to dry mixture,, one tablespoon at a mixture
6. Pour into into greased 9 x 9inch baking pan
7. Fill with boiling water
8. Bake at 350 for well done
9. Frost with chocolate frosting
